subject: fix(graph): use bg-neutral canvas background, restore colored nodes
body:
Graph canvas background set to DaisyUI neutral via bg-neutral class,
ensuring neutral-content edge labels are always readable. Nodes restored
to label-based colored backgrounds with white text — the neutral canvas
provides contrast for both nodes and edge text.

Tags: graph, cytoscape, theming, readability
